name: Fall Of The Son
short_description: Fall Of The Son is a roguelike deckbuilder. Assemble powerful strategies to battle through hordes of enemies - with 4 playable characters and over 200 unique cards at your disposal. Do you have the grit and determination to make it to the end and face off against The Son?
detailed_description:
Fall Of The Son is a roguelike deckbuilder. Assemble powerful strategies to battle through hordes of enemies - with 4 playable characters and over 200 unique cards at your disposal. Do you have the grit and determination to make it to the end and face off against The Son?

Classes:
  • Warrior
  • Rogue
  • Wizard
  • Monk
Each class has a different starting deck and unique card pool offering different playstyles.

Sequence your cards to optimise your damage output. Fall Of The Son features a number of stats and status effects that will influence the course of battle!


Improve after every room cleared. Choose cards to make your deck stronger, and utilise gold in shops to purchase cards and powerful artifacts.


Tactically play out each combat. Some battles may present overwhelming odds - focus your efforts to turn the tide in your favour.


Roguelike:
Features a random map and enemy selection during each run. This will consist of battles, rest points, shops and random events. Your progress is lost upon death.

Deckbuilder:
Select a new card to add to your deck at the end of each combat. Gain access to additional cards and strategies during random events.

Additional modifiers:
  • Survival - for a truly hardcore experience
  • Random/upgraded deck - for a more casual/chaotic experience
